title: Set up and mark an Assignment
staff_situations: How do I set up and mark an Assignment?
underlying_needs: A clear, consistent way to set work, collect submissions and return feedback in one place
Reliable digital marking that avoids lost paperwork and gives learners a saved record of feedback
A way to track completion and grades across the group without chasing individual submissions

accessibility: Digital rubrics and inline feedback can be read with a screen reader or text-to-speech tool
Learners can return to assignment instructions and feedback in their own time, at their own pace
inclusive_practice: Consistent assignment structure means every learner knows what to expect and where to find it
Digital submission gives a learner more than one route to submit work if writing by hand is a barrier

framework_alignment: Digital Skills Framework: assignments and feedback
